subject: reading
activity_templates: A 2nd-grade reading comprehension worksheet. Top half: a short 4-sentence kid-friendly story with a small illustration. Bottom half: 4 questions with lines to write answers (who, what, where, main idea). {{character}} appears next to the illustration.

A 2nd-grade 'Read and Draw' worksheet. A 3-sentence story at the top, and a large empty drawing box labeled 'Draw the main idea' at the bottom. Two comprehension questions in the margin. {{character}} is beside the story with a pencil.
A fiction passage comprehension worksheet. A 5-sentence cartoon-style story with a small picture, followed by 3 multiple-choice questions (A/B/C bubbles). {{character}} reads a book in the corner.

A non-fiction passage comprehension worksheet about a friendly animal fact (e.g. 'Bees live in hives. They make honey...'), with a picture of the animal. 3 short-answer questions underneath with writing lines. {{character}} points at the picture.
